offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties, inefficient inspection processes cause delayed maintenance responses. We simplify inspections and generate reports instead of manual inspection and report writing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try simple inspection checklist and user-friendly interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
